description: Resumable per-page content tracker for the ShopNest docs site. Baseline pages documenting every shipped feature are complete; long-tail deep-enrichment batches are listed below.

seoFloor.jsonLd: WebSite + Organization + SoftwareApplication (site-wide via docusaurus.config headTags)

enrichmentBacklog.rationale: Split payments/checkout into per-method guides (pay with Stripe, pay with PayPal, apply a coupon, fix a failed payment) each with 1000+ words, screenshots, and FAQ.
admin-dashboard.md is one overview; split into per-task guides (add a product, fulfill an order, moderate reviews, publish a blog post, read analytics).
Expand search/filter/comparison into how-to guides (compare two products, save a wishlist, use quick view) and category landing explainers.

workflow: Confirm the candidate pages map to real app features (no fabrication).
Write each page to the SEO floor; wire into sidebars.ts.
Update this tracker; ONE commit per batch.
resumeInstructions: Baseline is shipped. To deep-enrich, take the first 'pending' batch in enrichmentBacklog, write its pages to the SEO floor, add them to sidebars.ts, verify the build, mark the batch complete, and commit.
